query: SELECT id, contactName, teamMemberName, callType, callTypeSource, classification, classificationReason, duration FROM calls WHERE contactName LIKE '%BLUE SKY%' OR propertyAddress LIKE '%2408 Amber%' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 3;
